chunks.title: Haman's Rise and Wrath
chunks.reason: Narrative describing Haman's elevation, Mordecai's refusal to bow, and Haman's decision to target all Jews.

chunks.title: Haman's Proposal to the King
chunks.reason: Dialogue where Haman persuades the king to issue a decree and the king grants his authority.

chunks.title: Issuance of the Decree
chunks.reason: Description of the written law being drafted, sent to provinces, and the immediate aftermath in Susa.
